The memo: -

Reference No. 1 to the prescribed procedure to be followed before payment of salary and non-salaried dues of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Non-Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities. The directions have been issued vide Government Circular No.1 dated 13th September, 2022 in Reference No. Instructions have been issued for scrutiny and submission of proposals as per the Scrutiny List prescribed vide letter dated 27.09.2023.

Accordingly, as per the non-payment proposal of Shri Chhatrapati Pratishthan Managed Residential Matimand Vidyalaya, Anand Vihar Colony 1, Hingne Khurd, Sinhagad Road, Pune received by the Department from the Commissioner, Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Pune, funds are being disbursed to the Non-Governmental Organizations working for the category of Matimand for grant-in-aid (Programme), 31-Auxiliary Grants (Non-payment) as follows.
